name: FYNSA Administradora General De Fondos S.A.- Fondo De Inversion Fynsa Deuda Chile Fund
summary: FYNSA Administradora General De Fondos S.A.- Fondo De Inversion Fynsa Deuda Chile Fund invests in Chilean debt instruments. It is managed by FYNSA Administradora General de Fondos S.A. The fund's objective is to generate income and capital appreciation through investments in a diversified portfolio of Chilean bonds and other debt securities.
